Home › Pricing

Simple, Transparent Pricing

3 simple plans. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime. All prices in USD. VAT/GST added automatically at checkout based on your location.

💳 Credit / Debit Card — Visa, Mastercard, Amex Apple Pay 🅶 Google Pay 🔒 Creem secure checkout ✅ 72-h refunds
Single Card
Send one personalised card — great for birthdays or last-minute gifts.
$1.99
per card, one-time
  • ✅ 1 scheduled email delivery
  • ✅ Any date + time scheduling
  • ✅ Full editor (fonts, colors, filters)
  • ✅ 3877 templates included
  • ✅ Delivery confirmation email
  • ✅ Re-send once for free (7 days)
Pick a template →
Most popular for couples & families
Monthly Unlimited
Send as many cards as you want — one calendar month, any occasion.
$6.99
per month, auto-renews
Great for birthday + Christmas + anniversaries — saves money if you send 4+ cards/month
  • ✅ Unlimited scheduled deliveries
  • ✅ Any date + timezone scheduling
  • ✅ Full editor + upcoming)
  • ✅ 3877 templates included
  • ✅ Priority email support (<4hr replies)
  • ✅ Unlimited free re-sends (30 days)
  • ✅ Cancel anytime — no questions
Start Monthly →
Cancel from account settings or email support@sendafun.com — takes 24 hours.
Annual Pass 🎉
Best value — lowest per-card cost for families, grandparents, and anyone who remembers everyone.
$69
per year — billed once
That's just $5.75/month
  • ✅ 12 months unlimited deliveries
  • ✅ All features from Monthly
  • ✅ Pays for itself by the 35th card
  • ✅ 14-day full-refund guarantee *
  • ✅ Early access to new templates
  • ✅ Dedicated priority support line
Get Annual Pass →
* Refund within 14 days if fewer than 5 cards sent.

💳 Payment Methods — all secure, no card stored

All payments are processed by Creem (EU-based payment processor, PCI-DSS Level 1 compliant) — we never see, store, or transmit your full card number. Card data is encrypted in-transit and at-rest by Creem's servers only.

Credit / Debit Card — Visa, Mastercard, American ExpressAll major card networks. 3D-Secure 2.0 for extra fraud protection.
Apple PayOne-tap checkout on Safari macOS / iPhone.
Google PayFast checkout on Chrome, Android, and Google Pass.
CurrencyAll prices listed in USD (US Dollars). VAT, GST, or sales tax is added at checkout if applicable for your region.

↩️ Refund Policy — no fine print

Single Card ($1.99)

Full refund within 72 hours of purchase if delivery has not yet been scheduled or executed. After delivery we cannot refund because the service has been performed. To request a refund email support@sendafun.com with your order number.

Monthly ($6.99/mo)

Pro-rated cancellation. Cancel anytime. Cancelling stops the next auto-renewal charge. We do not grant partial-month refunds — your current month stays active until the billing period end date. Cancel via Account or email us.

Annual Pass ($69/yr)

Full refund within 14 days of purchase if fewer than 5 scheduled deliveries were performed. After 14 days, or after 5+ cards, no refund is issued. To request email support@sendafun.com order date and number

Still unsure?

Browse the FAQ for 20 more questions, email support@sendafun.com — we reply with 24 hours all week long.

🍪 We use cookies
Essential cookies keep the card editor working. Analytics and advertising cookies help us improve the site and show relevant ads, and are only set after you accept. Read the Privacy Policy or Cookie Policy for details.
